---
title: "Final Project"
author: "Yasmine Graham"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 1. Data Loading


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

# 2. Data Cleaning


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```


## Flights
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Tweets



```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

# 3. Analysis


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Flights Patterns

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather Impact
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Sentiment Analysis
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

# 4. Integration
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

# 5. Conclusion
